title: Al-Masih ad-Dajjal (The False Messiah)
description: The greatest tribulation from Creation to Qiyamah. A one-eyed deceiver who will claim divinity, perform supernatural feats, and lead many astray until defeated by Isa (AS).
descriptionArabic: أعظم فتنة على وجه الأرض منذ خلق آدم إلى قيام الساعة، رجل أعور يدعي الألوهية ويأتي بخوارق، يقتله عيسى عليه السلام.

hadithReferences.text: There is no creation between the creation of Adam and the onset of the Hour greater than Dajjal.

scholarlyOpinions.view: Dajjal is a literal human testing humanity's faith, permitted by Allah to show miraculous deceptions.

historicalEvidence: Warned against by every prophet from Nuh (AS) to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.
contemporaryObservations: Modern systems of illusion, spiritual blindness, and materialist deceptions serving as precursors.

faqs.question: How can a believer protect themselves from Dajjal?
faqs.answer: By reciting the first 10 verses of Surah Al-Kahf, seeking refuge in Tashahhud, and maintaining strong Tawheed.

title: Imam Al-Mahdi (The Guided Leader)
description: A righteous leader from the lineage of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ (via Fatimah) who will fill the earth with justice and fairness after it was filled with oppression.
descriptionArabic: رجل من أهل بيت النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم من ولد فاطمة، يملأ الأرض قسطاً وعدلاً كما ملئت جوراً وظلماً.

hadithReferences.text: The Mahdi is from my lineage, from the descendants of Fatimah...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Narrations regarding the Mahdi reach mutawatir (concurrent transmission) status in meaning.

historicalEvidence: Many historical impostors claimed this title, but the true Mahdi will be given allegiance at the Ka'bah without seeking it.
contemporaryObservations: Universal longing for justice amidst widespread systemic oppression.

faqs.question: Where will the Mahdi emerge?
faqs.answer: He will emerge from Medina and receive allegiance at the Holy Ka'bah in Mecca.

title: Descent of Prophet Isa (Jesus) bin Maryam (AS)
titleArabic: نزول عيسى ابن مريم عليه السلام
description: Prophet Isa (AS) will descend at the white minaret east of Damascus, kill Dajjal at the Gate of Ludd, break the cross, abolish the Jizyah, and rule with the Qur'an.
descriptionArabic: ينزل عيسى عليه السلام عند المنارة البيضاء شرقي دمشق، فيقتل الدجال عند باب لد ويحكم بشريعة الإسلام.

quranReferences.text: وَإِنَّهُ لَعِلْمٌ لِّلسَّاعَةِ فَلَا تَمْتَرُنَّ بِهَا

hadithReferences.text: By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, the son of Maryam will soon descend among you as a just judge...

scholarlyOpinions.view: The descent of Isa (AS) is explicitly affirmed in both Mutawatir Hadith and Qur'anic exegesis.

historicalEvidence: The white minaret of the Umayyad Mosque in Damascus stands as a historical reference point.
contemporaryObservations: Expectation shared across Islamic eschatological scholarship.

faqs.question: Where will Isa (AS) defeat Dajjal?
faqs.answer: At the Gate of Ludd (Lod in Palestine).

title: Emergence of Yajuj and Majuj (Gog and Magog)
description: Vast tribes currently restrained behind the barrier built by Dhul-Qarnayn who will break through and swarm down from every elevation, consuming all water in their path.
descriptionArabic: أمتان عظيمتان مفسدتان في الأرض، يخرجون بعد قتل الدجال فيعيثون في الأرض فساداً حتى يهلكهم الله بدعاء عيسى.

quranReferences.text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا فُتِحَتْ يَأْجُوجُ وَمَأْجُوجُ وَهُم مِّن كُلِّ حَدَبٍ يَنسِلُونَ

hadithReferences.text: Allah will reveal to Isa: I have brought forth servants of Mine whom no one has the power to fight...

scholarlyOpinions.view: They will be destroyed by divine intervention through parasite worms (Naghaf) after Isa (AS) prays to Allah.

historicalEvidence: Mentioned in Surah Al-Kahf (9:93-98) regarding the wall built of iron and copper by Dhul-Qarnayn.

faqs.question: How will Yajuj and Majuj be defeated?
faqs.answer: Not by human armies, but by Allah sending parasitic worms to strike their necks after Prophet Isa (AS) supplicates.

title: The Great Smoke (Ad-Dukhan)
description: A dense haze/smoke will cover the entire earth for forty days, causing believers a light cold-like sickness while severely tormenting disbelievers.
descriptionArabic: دخان يملأ الأرض، يصيب المؤمن كالزكام، وينفخ الكافر حتى يخرج من كل مسمع منه.

quranReferences.text: فَارْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِي السَّمَاءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until you see ten signs... and he mentioned the Smoke...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Scholars noted two smoke events: one partial during the Quraish famine, and the major global end-times Smoke.

faqs.question: How long will the Smoke last?
faqs.answer: Authentic reports state it will engulf the atmosphere for forty days.

title: The Beast of the Earth (Dabbat al-Ard)
description: A miraculous creature emerging from the earth holding the Staff of Musa (AS) and Seal of Sulaiman (AS), marking the faces of believers and disbelievers.
descriptionArabic: دابة تخرج فتكلم الناس وتميز المؤمن من الكافر بميسم تضع علامة على الوجوه.

quranReferences.text: وَإِذَا وَقَعَ الْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَابَّةً مِّنَ الْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ

hadithReferences.text: The Beast will emerge carrying the staff of Moses and the seal ring of Solomon...

scholarlyOpinions.view: The Beast speaks to humanity confirming that people disbelieved in divine signs.

contemporaryObservations: Represents the total clarity between faith and disbelief after repentance closes.

faqs.question: Will the Beast speak to human beings?
faqs.answer: Yes, Surah An-Naml explicitly states 'it will speak to them' (tukallimuhum).

title: Three Earthquakes / Landslides (Al-Khasufat al-Thalathah)
description: Three colossal earth-swallowing cave-ins (Khasf): one in the East, one in the West, and one in the Arabian Peninsula.
descriptionArabic: ثلاثة خسوفات عظيمة: خسف بالمشرق، وخسف بالمغرب، وخسف بجزيرة العرب.

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not come until you see ten signs... and three landslides: one in the East, one in the West, and one in Arabia.

scholarlyOpinions.view: These are cataclysmic structural earth collapses far beyond routine tectonic quakes.

contemporaryObservations: Geological reminders of massive subterranean fault-line vulnerabilities.

faqs.question: Where will the three major landslides take place?
faqs.answer: One in the East, one in the West, and one specifically in the Arabian Peninsula.

title: Sun Rising from the West (Tulu' al-Shams min Maghribiha)
description: The cosmic order reverses and the sun rises from the West. On this day, the door of repentance (Tawbah) is permanently closed forever.
descriptionArabic: تطلع الشمس من مغربها، فإذا رآها الناس آمنوا أجمعون، فذلك حين لا ينفع نفساً إيمانها لم تكن آمنت من قبل.

quranReferences.text: يَوْمَ يَأْتِي بَعْضُ آيَاتِ رَبِّكَ لَا يَنفَعُ نَفْسًا إِيمَانُهَا لَمْ تَكُنْ آمَنَتْ مِن قَبْلُ

hadithReferences.text: The Hour will not be established until the sun rises from the West...

scholarlyOpinions.view: Repentance is accepted until this sign manifests; once the sun rises from the West, faith is no longer accepted from new believers.

faqs.question: Can a person repent after the sun rises from the West?
faqs.answer: No. Authentic texts explicitly confirm the door of repentance closes permanently at this moment.

title: The Gathering Fire from Yemen (Nar al-Yaman)
titleArabic: نار تخرج من اليمن تطرد الناس إلى محشرهم
description: A massive fire will emerge from the bottom of Aden (Yemen) driving humanity to their place of gathering (Al-Mahshar) in Syria.
descriptionArabic: آخر ذلك نار تخرج من قعرة عدن تطرد الناس إلى محشرهم، تقيل معهم حيث قالوا وتبيت معهم حيث باتوا.

hadithReferences.text: The last of the signs is a fire which will emerge from Yemen and drive people to their place of gathering...

scholarlyOpinions.view: This physical gathering in Sham (Syria) is the final earthly gathering before the Horn blast.

historicalEvidence: Documented as the 10th major sign in Sahih Muslim.
contemporaryObservations: Volcanic rift zones under Aden bay.

faqs.question: Where will the fire drive the people?
faqs.answer: It will drive humanity to the land of Sham (Syria) for the final earthly gathering.

title: The Trumpet Blasts (Nafkhat as-Sur)
description: Israfil (AS) blows the Trumpet twice: the first blast causes all in heaven and earth to fall swooning/dead, and the second blast resurrects all creation for Judgement.
descriptionArabic: ينفخ إسرائيل في الصور نفختين: الأولى نفخة الصعق فيصعق كل من في السماوات والأرض، والثانية نفخة البعث والقيام لرب العالمين.

quranReferences.text: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَصَعِقَ مَن فِي السَّماوَاتِ وَمَن فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَاءَ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ نُفِخَ فِيهِ أُخْرَىٰ فَإِذَا هُمْ قِيَامٌ يَنظُرُونَ

hadithReferences.text: Between the two blasts of the Trumpet there will be forty (days/months/years)...

scholarlyOpinions.view: The Horn blasts signal the final end of earthly existence and the immediate dawn of Resurrection.

historicalEvidence: Affirmed across all divine books and Quranic Surahs (Al-Zalzalah, Al-Haqqah, Az-Zumar).
contemporaryObservations: The ultimate culmination of physical universe existence.

faqs.question: How many blasts of the Trumpet are there?
faqs.answer: Two primary blasts mentioned in Surah Az-Zumar 39:68: the blast of swooning/death (S'aq) and the blast of resurrection (Ba'th).
